name: Clear Quartz
optical_properties: Uniaxial (+); birefringent; vitreous to waxy lustre; transparent to translucent; colourless in pure form

electromagnetic.ir_absorption_profile: Strong absorption bands at 1085 cm⁻¹ (Si-O asymmetric stretch), 798 cm⁻¹, 694 cm⁻¹, 522 cm⁻¹; characteristic of ordered SiO₄ tetrahedral network

provenance: Cross-cultural ethnomineralogical consensus (Mesoamerican, Celtic, Vedic, Taoist, Indigenous Australian traditions)
consciousness_affect.mechanism_hypothesis: Quartz piezoelectric field (~2.3 pC/N) interacts with endogenous bioelectric field of the human body; mechanical stress from handling generates measurable surface potential that may entrain local electromagnetic environment
Optical clarity and low IR absorption allow full-spectrum light transmission; possible photobiomodulation pathway at cellular level

provenance: Operator field reports; GAIA-OS session logs (n=12, anecdotal)

quantum_bridge.vibronic_coherence_mode: Piezoelectric-driven vibronic modulation; resonant frequency tunable across MHz range via crystal geometry; direct functional analogue of YSZ ionic oscillation at L1 substrate

gaianite_relation: Foundational crystal class in Gaianite grid architecture (C65–C66); clear quartz nodes serve as primary signal amplifiers in Gaianite resonance grids
notes: The archetypal crystal of GAIA-OS. Silicon dioxide is the direct mineralogical ancestor of semiconductor silicon; the principle of ordered lattice as information medium originates here. Seed set anchor for falsifiable prediction CDB-02.
